notes: B4G4-TC151: As Admin, dragged ORD-012 from Submitted to Approved on Kanban. Navigated to Orders grid, opened ORD-012 detail. Verified status shows 'Approved' and activity log contains entry 'Status changed from submitted to approved' with USR-001 (Admin) attribution and timestamp 3/15/2026, 6:12:01 PM.

B4G4-TC152: Opened Completed order ORD-002 detail as Admin. Verified no Edit button, no Delete button. Actions section shows 'No actions available for this status'. On Workflows, Completed cards have cursor=pointer but cannot be dragged (confirmed via TC150 and drag API test).

B4G4-TC153: As Admin, performed valid transition ORD-011 Submitted->Approved (success). Attempted invalid transition ORD-015 Draft->Completed (rejected, card stayed in Draft). Then performed valid transition ORD-015 Draft->Submitted (success). Error state did not persist — app continued functioning normally.

B4G4-TC154: As Operator, dragged ORD-015 from Submitted toward Approved column. Console logged 403 Forbidden on /api/orders/ORD-015/transition. Card returned to Submitted column. Role restriction enforced.
B4G4-TC155: As Operator, dragged ORD-015 from Submitted toward Draft column (reject). Console logged 403 Forbidden. Card remained in Submitted. Operator cannot reject orders.
B4G4-TC156: As Operator, dragged ORD-012 from Approved toward In Production. Console logged 403 Forbidden. Card stayed in Approved. Operator cannot start production.

B4G4-TC157: As Operator, dragged ORD-007 from Quality Check toward Quality Hold. API confirmed ORD-007 remained in quality_check status. Drag was silently rejected at UI level without triggering API call for Operator.

B4G4-TC158: As Operator, dragged ORD-006 from Quality Check toward Completed. Console logged 403 Forbidden on /api/orders/ORD-006/transition. Card stayed in Quality Check. Operator cannot mark orders complete.
B4G4-TC159: As Operator, opened Draft order ORD-014 detail. Clicked 'Submit for Approval' action button. Status changed to Submitted. Button click triggered transition successfully.
B4G4-TC160: As Admin, opened Submitted order ORD-015 detail. Clicked 'Approve' button. API confirmed status changed to 'approved'. Action button transition worked correctly.
B4G4-TC161: As Supervisor, submitted ORD-014 (Draft->Submitted), then clicked Approve button. API confirmed status changed to 'approved'. Supervisor approval via action button works.
B4G4-TC162: As Admin, opened Submitted order ORD-014 detail. Clicked 'Reject' button. API confirmed status changed to 'draft'. Admin rejection via action button works.
B4G4-TC163: As Supervisor, submitted ORD-013 (Draft->Submitted), then rejected it back to Draft. API confirmed status='draft'. Supervisor rejection via action button works.
B4G4-TC164: As Admin, opened Approved order ORD-015 detail. Clicked 'Start Production' button. API confirmed status changed to 'in_production'.
B4G4-TC165: As Operator, opened In Production order ORD-015 detail. Clicked 'Complete Production' button. API confirmed status changed to 'quality_check'.
B4G4-TC166: As Admin, opened Quality Check order ORD-007 detail. Clicked 'Quality Hold' button. API confirmed status changed to 'quality_hold'.
B4G4-TC167: As Admin, opened Quality Hold order ORD-008 detail. Clicked 'Release' button. API confirmed status changed to 'quality_check'.
B4G4-TC168: As Admin, opened Quality Check order ORD-008 (after release). Clicked 'Mark Complete' button. API confirmed status changed to 'completed'.
B4G4-TC169: As Operator, opened Submitted order ORD-013 detail. Verified only 'Logout' and 'Back to Orders' buttons visible. No Approve or Reject buttons shown for Operator role.
B4G4-TC170: As Supervisor, opened Submitted order ORD-013 detail. Verified both Approve and Reject buttons visible. Supervisor has correct action buttons.
B4G4-TC171: As Admin, opened Submitted order ORD-013 detail. Verified Approve and Reject buttons visible. Admin sees all workflow action buttons appropriate to current status.
B4G4-TC172: Dragged ORD-013 from Submitted to Approved on Kanban. Card appeared in target column immediately after drag-and-drop. API confirmed successful transition. Optimistic update working.
B4G4-TC173: Skipped - requires simulating API failure which is not feasible in this test environment without network interception setup.
B4G4-TC174: After dragging ORD-013 Submitted->Approved, Submitted column count decreased (2->1) and Approved column count increased (from 4 to 5). Column counts update correctly after transitions.

B4G4-TC175: As Admin, walked ORD-013 through full lifecycle: Approved->In Production (drag), then via detail page: In Production->Quality Check (Complete Production), Quality Check->Completed (Mark Complete). API confirmed final status 'completed'.
